title: Autoscaling Workloads — Scaling cluster infrastructure
text:
If scaling workloads isn't enough to meet your needs, you can also scale your cluster infrastructure itself.
Scaling the cluster infrastructure normally means adding or removing
nodes
.
Read
Node autoscaling
for more information.
